zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny於1235年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆盧馬尼時，他的父親Nicolas V de Rumigny35歲，母親Isabelle de Coucy33歲。他於大約1260年與Yolande de Nesle de Soissons結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1270年8月2日在法國享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny于1235年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆盧馬尼时，他的父亲Nicolas V de Rumigny35岁，母亲Isabelle de Coucy33岁。他于大约1260年与Yolande de Nesle de Soissons结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1270年8月2日在法国享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny was born in 1235, in Rumigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Nicolas V de Rumigny, was 35 and his mother, Isabelle de Coucy, was 33. He married Yolande de Nesle de Soissons about 1260. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 2 August 1270, in France, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny est né en 1235, à Rumigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Nicolas V de Rumigny, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Coucy, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Yolande de Nesle de Soissons environ 1260. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 2 août 1270, à France, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny 1235 in Rumigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicolas V de Rumigny 35 und seine Mutter Isabelle de Coucy 33. Er hat um 1260 Yolande de Nesle de Soissons geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 2. August 1270 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny è nato il nel 1235 nel Rumigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Nicolas V de Rumigny, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle de Coucy, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Yolande de Nesle de Soissons circa 1260. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 2 agosto 1270, nel Francia, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumignyが1235年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメルミグニーで生まれた時，父Nicolas V de Rumignyは35歳，母Isabelle de Coucyは33歳であった。約1260年にYolande de Nesle de Soissonsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1270年8月2日にフランスで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny(이)가 1235년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 럼익니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicolas V de Rumigny(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de Coucy(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1260년 Yolande de Nesle de Soissons(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1270년 8월 2일 프랑스에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny nasceu em 1235, em Rumigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Nicolas V de Rumigny, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Coucy, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Yolande de Nesle de Soissons aproximadamente 1260. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 2 de agosto de 1270, em França, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny родился в 1235 г. в местности румигни, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Nicolas V de Rumigny было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Coucy, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Yolande de Nesle de Soissons около 1260 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 2 августа 1270 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny nació en 1235, en Rumigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Nicolas V de Rumigny, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Coucy, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Yolande de Nesle de Soissons aproximadamente 1260. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 2 de agosto de 1270, en Francia, a la edad de 35 años.
